name: @moolam/observability
description: Internal component of Sutra SDK — applications should install sutra-sdk. Exporter-agnostic OpenTelemetry bridge for Sutra hosts: turn/sync spans and meters. OTLP, console, or noop via env — no vendor SDK on the data path.

scripts.test: pnpm run build && node --test tests/otel_bridge.test.mjs tests/event_bus_spans.test.mjs tests/privacy_assertion.test.mjs tests/sync_audit.test.mjs tests/sync_wire_propagate.test.mjs tests/sync_advisory_events.test.mjs tests/event_catalog.test.mjs tests/validating_publish.test.mjs tests/event_schema_export.test.mjs tests/event_catalog_doc.test.mjs tests/edge_agent_bus_wire.test.mjs tests/turn_completed_bus.test.mjs tests/sync_outcome_bus.test.mjs tests/healing_metrics.test.mjs
